task: Squad Landing v5/v6 - Full build + GSAP ScrollTrigger refactor
what_worked: Incremental build approach: scaffold all sections first, then polish
Separating component concerns into folder-based structure (components/Hero/, components/Squad/, etc.)
CSS-only fallbacks for Three.js and fonts - made mobile/reduced-motion graceful
useGSAP + ScrollTrigger.create() per section with scrub, fastScrollEnd, preventOverlaps
what_failed: v5 initial build used manual window.addEventListener('scroll') + getBoundingClientRect() instead of GSAP ScrollTrigger - Gatekeeper caught this
GSAP ScrollTrigger imported but not actually used = 45KB dead weight in bundle
Terminal section was 1000vh (too tall) - needed to be 250vh
lesson: When a library is in the spec, actually USE it - don't fall back to manual DOM APIs. Dead imports inflate bundle AND violate the spec's architectural choice. Gatekeeper will catch it.
